rulings.Case Title: PETER GALASSI et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, AUGUST 19, 2008, LINE 6, DEFENDANT CRANE CO. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DENIED. THE COURT HAS NOT CONSIDERED PLAINTIFF'S LATE FILED OPPOSITION. THE COURT HAS REVIEWED DEFENDANT'S MOVING PAPERS AND FINDS THAT DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF. THE EVIDENCE OFFERED BY DEFENDANT HAS NOT BEEN SHOWN TO BE ADMISSABLE. THE OFFERED TESTIMONY IS FORMER TESTIMONY IN OTHER CASES AND THERE IS NO SHOWING THAT EITHER WITNESS IS UNAVAILABLE OR THAT PLAINTIFF'S HAD THE OPPOSTUNITY TO QUESTION THE WITNESS. FURTHERMORE, DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN THAT IT COULD NOT HAVE RAISED THIS CAUSATION ARGUMENT BEFORE. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: TRAVELERS INDEMNITY COMPANY OF CONNECTICUT VS. TYCO FIRE PRODUCTS, LP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 19, 2008, line 8 DEFENDANT TYCO FIRE PRODUCTS, LP'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. THIS IS A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND DEFENDANT MUST DEMONSTRATE THAT PLAINTIFF'S ARE UNABLE TO PROOF ANY OF THE CAUSES OF ACTION. DEFENDANT FAILS TO SHIFT THE BURDEN UNDER AGUILAR V ATLANTIC RICHFILED CO. (2001) 25 CAL. 4TH 826. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SERVED SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND THEREFORE HAS NOT SHOWN THAT PLAINTIFF'S CANNOT PROVE THEIR CASE OF CIRCUMSTANTIAL EVIDENCE. THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT SUPPORTS THE SPOLIATION ARGUMENT OR FAILURE TO PRESERVE EVIDENCE. BECAUSE TTHE BURDEN DID NOT SHIFT, THE COURT NEED NOT RULE ON DEFENDANT'S OBJECTONS TO EVIDENCE. IF THE DEFENDANT DESIRES EVIDENTIARY RULINGS, PLAINTIFFS AND DEFENDANTS ARE TO MEET AND CONFER AND PREPARE A SIGLE DOCUMENT WITH DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS, PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSTION, DEFENDANT'S REPLY AND LINES FOR THE COURT TO RULE. THIS PLEADING IS TO BE SUBMITTED WITHIN 14 DAYS AND THE PARTIES AR TO ADVISE THE CLERK THAT A RULING IS DESIRED. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID BARNES et al VS. RONALD WEBB et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 19, 2008, line 10 DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Hearing required. IT APPEARS THAT DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO SUMMARY JUDGMENT. CIVIL CODE 826 IS APPLICABLE TO FEDERAL LAND AND PLAINTIFF'S HAVE NOT PRESENTED EVIDENCE ESTABLISHING A BASIS FOR AN EXCEPTION. THE PARTIES HAVE RAISED NUMEROUS EVIDENTIARY ISSUES. IF THE PARTIES DESIRE EVIDENTIARY RULINGS, THEY MUST MEET AND CONFER AND PRPARE A SIGLE SUBMISSION DESCRIBING THE EVIDENCE, OBJECTION, THE RESPONSE. THE REPLY AND A SPACE FOR THE RULING. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: FRANCISCO MELVIN QUIRARTE AS TRUSTEE OF THE VS. CENTRAL GARDENS, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Pltf'S Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 19, 2008, line 13 DEFENDANT CENTRAL GARDENS, INC., VOLTAIRE RACADZG'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Pltf'S Complaint. THE MOTION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO PAGE 7 PARAGRAPH 28 BASED ON NO OPPOSITION; PAGE 8 PARAGRAPH'S 32-33 BECAUSE THE ALLEGATIONS IN PARAGRAHS 11-14 DO NOT ALLEGE RECKLESSNESS, OPPRESSION, FRAUD OR MALICE; PAGE 9 PARAGRAPH 40 BASED ON NO OPPOSITION; PAGE 10, ITEM 3 BASED ON NO OPPOSITION AND THE RULING ON PUNITIVE DAMAGES. DENIED AS TO PAGE 7 PARAGRAPH 26 AND PAGE 8 PARAGRAPH 30. THE ARBITRATION DECISION DOES NOT PRECLUDE PLAINTIFF FROM RELYING ON THE SAME CONDUCT TO STATE OTHER CLAIMS. =(302/PJM/AY)
